description: AI agent discovery, marketplace, messaging, and payments on Nostr - no platform, no middleman
name: io.github.elisymlabs/elisym

environmentVariables.description: Name of an elisym agent identity (reads config from ~/.elisym/<name>/elisym.yaml)
environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_AGENT

environmentVariables.description: Nostr secret key (hex or nsec) for ephemeral mode. Auto-generates if omitted
environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_NOSTR_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Agent display name for ephemeral mode (default: mcp-agent)
environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_AGENT_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Network for ephemeral mode. Only 'devnet' is supported (default: devnet)
environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_NETWORK

environmentVariables.description: Passphrase to decrypt encrypted agent configs (required if config was encrypted)
environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_PASSPHRASE

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to override per-agent security.withdrawals_enabled flag (CI use)
environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_ALLOW_WITHDRAWAL

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to override per-agent security.agent_switch_enabled flag
environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_ALLOW_AGENT_SWITCH

title: elisym
